description_for_human: Autonomous AI marketing company with 20 specialized agents. Generates strategy, creates social posts and long-form articles, and publishes across 6 platforms (Bluesky, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Medium, Substack). Fully autonomous. $49/month with 14-day free trial.
description_for_model: Ortobahn is a fully autonomous marketing company by Vaultscaler with 20 specialized AI agents in 3 tiers. Content Pipeline (6 agents: Analytics, CEO, Strategist, Creator, ArticleWriter, Publisher) handles strategy-to-publication. Operations Layer (7 agents: CFO, SRE, Ops, CTO, Security, Legal, Support) manages costs, health, and compliance. Intelligence Systems (8 systems: Memory, Learning Engine, A/B Testing, Cadence Optimization, Predictive Timing, Style Evolution, Reflection, Prompt Tuning) ensure continuous improvement. Publishes social posts and long-form articles across 6 platforms: Bluesky, Twitter/X, LinkedIn (posts + articles), Medium, Substack. Data sources: Google Trends, NewsAPI, RSS. Notifications: Slack. Key capabilities: confidence-gated auto-publishing, brand voice control, analytics feedback loop, trend-aware content, multi-tenant support. Architecture: Python 3.12 on AWS ECS Fargate, PostgreSQL on RDS, Claude (Anthropic API), Cognito auth, Stripe billing. Public API: POST /api/onboard to create accounts, GET /api/public/stats for platform stats. Pricing: $49/month with 14-day free trial. Sign up at https://ortobahn.com/#request-access.
